title: MRF is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: MRF is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? MRF in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!
